FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCP_TRANSCTN_REFRCS_CG1 EXTRC
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
  AND NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 
     FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_TRANSCTN_REFRNCS_CG1 SXTRC
	 WHERE 1=1
	  /*AND EXTRC.ATTRIBUTE_ID = SXTRC.ATTRIBUTE_ID
	   AND EXTRC.REF_CTL_ID = SXTRC.REF_CTL_ID */
	   AND EXTRC.INTERFACE_ID =SXTRC.INTERFACE_ID
   )

LONG_REFERENCE38              ,
LONG_REFERENCE39              ,
LONG_REFERENCE40              ,
BATCH_ID                      ,
ACTION_CD                     ,
CREATE_DATETIME  ,
SS_CODE                        ,
'INCR' AS EXCEPTION_CD        ,
'RI'   AS EXCEPTION_TYPE      ,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
REFRESH_DATETIME              
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_TRANSCTN_REFRNCS_CG1 HXTR
WHERE 
1=1
AND
(
/* Not present in the Parent */
 NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT
  WHERE HXTR.INTERFACE_ID = NCT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
    AND NCT.BK_SS_CD = 'CG1'
)
)
OR /* all 4 are NULLs*/
(
HXTR.REFERENCE6 IS NULL 
AND HXTR.REFERENCE26 IS NULL 
AND HXTR.REFERENCE46 IS NULL 
AND HXTR.REFERENCE66 IS NULL 
)
OR /* match between any of the 4 */
(
 COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE6,'UNK') = COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE26,'UNK1') 
OR COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE6,'UNK') = COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE46,'UNK2') 
OR COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE6,'UNK') = COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE66,'UNK3') 
OR COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE26,'UNK1') = COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE46,'UNK2') 
OR COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE26,'UNK1') = COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE66,'UNK3') 
OR COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE46,'UNK2') = COALESCE(HXTR.REFERENCE66,'UNK3') 
)

SELECT
N_CTCD_CG1.BK_CUSTOMS_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CD   ,
N_CTCD_CG1.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY               ,
N_CTCD_CG1.FREIGHT_PAYMENT_METHOD_CD     ,
N_CTCD_CG1.LOCATION_TYPE_CD              ,
N_CTCD_CG1.DUTY_CD                       ,
N_CTCD_CG1.SHIP_TO_FLG                   ,
N_CTCD_CG1.LEG_1_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
N_CTCD_CG1.CMRCL_INV_SLR_GTC_BIZ_ENT_NM  ,
N_CTCD_CG1.LEG_2_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
N_CTCD_CG1.LEG_2_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
N_CTCD_CG1.LEG_1_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
N_CTCD_CG1.INCO_TERM_CD                  ,
N_CTCD_CG1.SHIP_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
N_CTCD_CG1.BILL_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
N_CTCD_CG1.IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_ADDR       ,
N_CTCD_CG1.IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME       ,
N_CTCD_CG1.IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM        ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM   ,            
USER                 AS EDW_CREATE_USER  ,           
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM   ,          
USER                 AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,
N_CTCD_CG1.SRC_DOC_NUM_INT				 ,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE ,
(CASE WHEN NCTCD.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END) AS DML_TYPE         
FROM
(
 /* DOC1 */
 SELECT 
 SXTR.REFERENCE6 AS BK_CUSTOMS_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CD,
 NCT.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE10,'N') AS SHIP_TO_FLG,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE11,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_1_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE7,'UNKNOWN')  AS CMRCL_INV_SLR_GTC_BIZ_ENT_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE13,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_2_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE12,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_1_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE14,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_2_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE18,-999) AS SHIP_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE16,-999) AS BILL_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE8,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE9,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.LONG_REFERENCE2,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_ADDR,
  (CASE WHEN INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE19,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(SXTR.REFERENCE19,1,INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE19,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE19,'UNKNOWN') END) AS INCO_TERM_CD, 
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE19,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(SXTR.REFERENCE19,INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE19,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS REFERENCE19_2,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE19_2,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE19_2,1,INDEX(REFERENCE19_2,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(REFERENCE19_2,'UNKNOWN') END) AS LOCATION_TYPE_CD,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE19_2,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE19_2,INDEX(REFERENCE19_2,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS REFERENCE19_3,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE19_3,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE19_3,1,INDEX(REFERENCE19_3,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(REFERENCE19_3,'UNKNOWN') END) AS DUTY_CD,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE19_3,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE19_3,INDEX(REFERENCE19_3,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS FREIGHT_PAYMENT_METHOD_CD,
 1 AS SRC_DOC_NUM_INT	   
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_TRANSCTN_REFRNCS_CG1 SXTR
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT
 ON (SXTR.INTERFACE_ID = NCT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT AND NCT.BK_SS_CD = 'CG')
 WHERE SXTR.REFERENCE6 IS NOT NULL 
   AND ( SXTR.REFERENCE6 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE26,'UNK')
 AND SXTR.REFERENCE6 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE46,'UNK')
 AND SXTR.REFERENCE6 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE66,'UNK'))

 UNION ALL
 
 /* DOC2 */
 
 SELECT 
 SXTR.REFERENCE26 AS BK_CUSTOMS_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CD,
 NCT.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE30,'N') AS SHIP_TO_FLG,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE31,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_1_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE27,'UNKNOWN')  AS CMRCL_INV_SLR_GTC_BIZ_ENT_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE33,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_2_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE32,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_1_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE34,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_2_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE38,-999) AS SHIP_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE36,-999) AS BILL_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE28,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE29,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.LONG_REFERENCE8,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_ADDR,
  (CASE WHEN INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE39,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(SXTR.REFERENCE39,1,INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE39,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE39,'UNKNOWN') END) AS INCO_TERM_CD, 
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE39,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(SXTR.REFERENCE39,INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE39,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS REFERENCE39_2,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE39_2,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE39_2,1,INDEX(REFERENCE39_2,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(REFERENCE39_2,'UNKNOWN') END) AS LOCATION_TYPE_CD,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE39_2,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE39_2,INDEX(REFERENCE39_2,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS REFERENCE39_3,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE39_3,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE39_3,1,INDEX(REFERENCE39_3,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(REFERENCE39_3,'UNKNOWN') END) AS DUTY_CD,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE39_3,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE39_3,INDEX(REFERENCE39_3,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS FREIGHT_PAYMENT_METHOD_CD,
 2 AS SRC_DOC_NUM_INT	   
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_TRANSCTN_REFRNCS_CG1 SXTR
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT
 ON (SXTR.INTERFACE_ID = NCT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT AND NCT.BK_SS_CD = 'CG')
 WHERE SXTR.REFERENCE26 IS NOT NULL 
  AND ( SXTR.REFERENCE26 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE6,'UNK')
 AND SXTR.REFERENCE26 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE46,'UNK')
 AND SXTR.REFERENCE26 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE66,'UNK'))
 
 UNION ALL
 
 /* DOC3 */
 
 SELECT 
 SXTR.REFERENCE46 AS BK_CUSTOMS_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CD,
 NCT.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE50,'N') AS SHIP_TO_FLG,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE51,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_1_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE47,'UNKNOWN')  AS CMRCL_INV_SLR_GTC_BIZ_ENT_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE53,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_2_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE52,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_1_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE54,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_2_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE58,-999) AS SHIP_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE56,-999) AS BILL_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE48,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE49,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.LONG_REFERENCE14,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_ADDR,
  (CASE WHEN INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE59,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(SXTR.REFERENCE59,1,INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE59,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE59,'UNKNOWN') END) AS INCO_TERM_CD, 
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE59,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(SXTR.REFERENCE59,INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE59,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS REFERENCE59_2,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE59_2,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE59_2,1,INDEX(REFERENCE59_2,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(REFERENCE59_2,'UNKNOWN') END) AS LOCATION_TYPE_CD,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE59_2,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE59_2,INDEX(REFERENCE59_2,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS REFERENCE59_3,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE59_3,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE59_3,1,INDEX(REFERENCE59_3,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(REFERENCE59_3,'UNKNOWN') END) AS DUTY_CD,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE59_3,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE59_3,INDEX(REFERENCE59_3,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS FREIGHT_PAYMENT_METHOD_CD,
 3 AS SRC_DOC_NUM_INT	   
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_TRANSCTN_REFRNCS_CG1 SXTR
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT
 ON (SXTR.INTERFACE_ID = NCT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT AND NCT.BK_SS_CD = 'CG')
 WHERE SXTR.REFERENCE46 IS NOT NULL 
  AND ( SXTR.REFERENCE46 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE6,'UNK')
 AND SXTR.REFERENCE46 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE26,'UNK')
 AND SXTR.REFERENCE46 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE66,'UNK'))
 
 UNION ALL
 
 /* DOC4 */
 
 SELECT 
 SXTR.REFERENCE66 AS BK_CUSTOMS_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CD,
 NCT.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE70,'N') AS SHIP_TO_FLG,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE71,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_1_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE67,'UNKNOWN')  AS CMRCL_INV_SLR_GTC_BIZ_ENT_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE73,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_2_BILL_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE72,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_1_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE74,'UNKNOWN') AS LEG_2_SHIP_CST_GTC_BIZ_ENTY_NM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE78,-999) AS SHIP_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE76,-999) AS BILL_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE68,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME,
 COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE69,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM,
 COALESCE(SXTR.LONG_REFERENCE20,'UNKNOWN') AS IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_ADDR,
  (CASE WHEN INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE79,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(SXTR.REFERENCE79,1,INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE79,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE79,'UNKNOWN') END) AS INCO_TERM_CD, 
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE79,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(SXTR.REFERENCE79,INDEX(SXTR.REFERENCE79,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS REFERENCE79_2,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE79_2,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE79_2,1,INDEX(REFERENCE79_2,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(REFERENCE79_2,'UNKNOWN') END) AS LOCATION_TYPE_CD,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE79_2,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE79_2,INDEX(REFERENCE79_2,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS REFERENCE79_3,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE79_3,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE79_3,1,INDEX(REFERENCE79_3,'/')-1) 
       ELSE COALESCE(REFERENCE79_3,'UNKNOWN') END) AS DUTY_CD,
 (CASE WHEN INDEX(REFERENCE79_3,'/') <> 0 THEN SUBSTR(REFERENCE79_3,INDEX(REFERENCE79_3,'/')+1)   
       ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS FREIGHT_PAYMENT_METHOD_CD,
 4 AS SRC_DOC_NUM_INT	   
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_TRANSCTN_REFRNCS_CG1 SXTR
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT
 ON (SXTR.INTERFACE_ID = NCT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT AND NCT.BK_SS_CD = 'CG')
 WHERE SXTR.REFERENCE66 IS NOT NULL 
   AND ( SXTR.REFERENCE66 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE6,'UNK')
 AND SXTR.REFERENCE66 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE26,'UNK')
 AND SXTR.REFERENCE66 <> COALESCE(SXTR.REFERENCE46,'UNK'))

 
 ) N_CTCD_CG1
 
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRX_CUSTOMS_DOCUMENT NCTCD
ON (
NCTCD.BK_CUSTOMS_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CD = N_CTCD_CG1.BK_CUSTOMS_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CD
AND NCTCD.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY = N_CTCD_CG1.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY
)
